compact_for_parent: Pass 3 (cost-feasibility) | HIGH | 1 must_fix, 4 should_fix | Key: Peak model omits variable meters; Peak total inconsistent; Free-tier cliffs unmodeled

findings.title: Peak-season estimate scales only compute and underprices 3x demand
findings.recommendation: Recompute peak with workload-linked multipliers across all variable meters (SQL, logs, networking), publish p50/p90 bands.

findings.title: Peak totals are internally inconsistent across sections
findings.recommendation: Define canonical scope for peak (Prod-only vs Prod+Dev) and sync all sections.

findings.title: Free-tier assumptions sit at pricing cliffs without overflow modeling
findings.recommendation: Add priced overflow scenarios for MAU and log ingestion with budget alerts.

findings.title: Private Link and DNS variable charges are only partially modeled
findings.recommendation: Add traffic-based networking assumptions and sensitivity bands.

findings.title: Budget monitoring design is below mandatory cost-governance baseline
findings.recommendation: Add 80/100/120% forecast alerts and anomaly detection per repository governance rules.

findings.title: No explicit checkpoint for reservation or savings-plan reevaluation
findings.recommendation: Add 3-6 month post-launch FinOps checkpoint for RI/SP evaluation.
